items.name: length of pipe
items.desc: Galvanized persuasion. Was holding up a sink once.

items.name: kitchen knife
items.desc: Somebody's mother chopped onions with this for twenty years.

items.name: box cutter
items.desc: Union issue, once.

items.name: aluminum bat
items.desc: Pre-war Little League. The dents are post-war.

items.name: machete
items.desc: Sold as a gardening tool. The receipt says gardening tool.

items.name: crowbar
items.desc: Opens doors, arguments, and skulls, in that order of warranty.

items.name: zip pistol
items.desc: Hand-machined in somebody's basement. Loud in every sense.

items.name: harbor revolver
items.desc: Fished out of the East River and lovingly restored. Mostly.

items.name: loose cartridges
items.desc: Mixed calibers, mixed decades, mixed results.

items.name: canvas work jacket
items.desc: Smells like every job site since 2029.

items.name: stab vest
items.desc: Decommissioned. The stamp says WHY is scratched out.

items.name: drone-crew pads
items.desc: Crash gear from the Circuit. Lighter than it looks.

items.name: can of beans
items.desc: The label is a different brand than the can. Both lie.

items.name: bacalao roll
items.desc: Still warm. The bodega's one indisputable miracle.

items.name: real coffee, small
items.desc: Real beans. You can tell because of the price.

items.name: cart dumplings
items.desc: Six for five dollars. The filling is best enjoyed unidentified.

items.name: tallboy
items.desc: Brewed in Queens under a name you almost recognize.

items.name: bandage roll
items.desc: Sterile-ish.

items.name: street medkit
items.desc: Assembled by someone who has seen things go wrong professionally.

items.name: painkillers, loose
items.desc: The expiry date has been thumbed off, which is its own answer.

items.name: dead phone
items.desc: Holds no charge but all your photos. Heavier than it weighs.

items.name: copper coil
items.desc: The city's most honest currency.

items.name: salvaged battery
items.desc: Holds a charge. In this economy that's jewelry.

items.name: blackout candle
items.desc: Authenticated relic of the dark years, says the wax stamp. The stamp is wax.

items.name: subway token, last run
items.desc: From the final fare of a dead line. The faithful pay double.

items.name: vial of '31 floodwater
items.desc: Sealed in a baby-food jar. Provenance: trust me.

items.name: mechanical watch
items.desc: Keeps time without asking a network's permission.

items.name: scrap bundle
items.desc: Rebar, tin, the skeleton of a folding chair.

items.name: black umbrella
items.desc: One spoke bent. It has outlived three owners and knows it.

items.name: engraved flask
items.desc: "TO V., WHO STAYED." Empty.

items.name: a body
items.desc: Someone who ran out of decade.

items.name: sealed package
items.desc: Do not open. You haven't. The not-opening is most of the wage.

items.name: folded bills
items.desc: Legal tender, lightly haunted. Picks itself up into your pocket.
